title.en: England's best World Cup for 60 years - but how should it be judged?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰60年来最好的世界杯-但应该如何评判？

summary.en: England have secured their best men's World Cup finish since winning the tournament 60 years ago. Is their performance at the 2026 edition being under-appreciated?
summary.zh-CN: 自60年前赢得比赛以来，英格兰队已经取得了他们最好的男子世界杯决赛。他们在2026年的表现是否被低估了？

title.en: England beat France in 10-goal thriller to win third-place play-off
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队在10球惊悚片中击败法国队，赢得第三名附加赛

summary.en: Bukayo Saka scores a hat-trick as England beat France 6-4 in a thriller to record their best men's World Cup finish since 1966.
summary.zh-CN: Bukayo Saka获得帽子戏法，英格兰队以惊悚片以6比4击败法国队，创下了自1966年以来最好的男子世界杯决赛纪录。

title.en: Bellingham breaks England World Cup goals record
title.zh-CN: 贝灵厄姆打破英格兰世界杯进球纪录

summary.en: Jude Bellingham becomes the first Englishman to score seven goals at a single World Cup with a late strike against France.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）成为第一位在对阵法国的比赛中打进7球的英国人。

title.en: Brilliant first half, turbulent second - Tuchel
title.zh-CN: 辉煌的上半场，动荡的第二场- Tuchel

summary.en: England manager praises his players as England beat France 6-4 for third place in the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队经理称赞他的球员，因为英格兰队在2026年世界杯上以6比4击败法国队获得第三名

title.en: Hat-trick hero Saka: I'm fit and wanted to play more
title.zh-CN: 帽子戏法英雄Saka ：我很健康，想玩得更多

summary.en: Bukayo Saka revealed he "wanted to play more" at the World Cup after scoring a hat-trick to earn England a bronze medal against France - after Thomas Tuchel tactically left him out of the semi-final...
summary.zh-CN: Bukayo Saka透露，他在对阵法国的比赛中获得帽子戏法以获得铜牌后，他“想在世界杯上打得更多” -在Thomas Tuchel战术性地将他排除在半决赛之外之后......

title.en: Bellingham sets new England record! The best stats from 10-goal thriller...
title.zh-CN: 贝灵厄姆创下新英格兰纪录！ 10个目标惊悚片的最佳统计数据...

title.en: Over to you, Messi - Mbappe leads Golden Boot race for the ages
title.zh-CN: 向您致敬，梅西-姆巴佩多年来一直引领着金靴赛

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe leads the Golden Boot race by two goals but Lionel Messi could yet overtake him in the World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）以两个进球领先金靴赛，但莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）仍有可能在世界杯决赛中超越他

title.en: Hydration breaks not popular and Fifa will review - Wenger
title.zh-CN: 补水休息不受欢迎，国际足联将审查-温格

summary.en: Arsene Wenger says he accepts the hydration breaks introduced at the 2026 World Cup have not been popular and Fifa will review their impact after the tournament.
summary.zh-CN: Arsene Wenger表示，他接受2026年世界杯引入的补水休息并不受欢迎，国际足联将在比赛结束后审查其影响。

title.en: Spain's final training session before World Cup final cancelled
title.zh-CN: 西班牙在世界杯决赛前的最后一次训练课程被取消

summary.en: Spain's final session before Sunday's World Cup final has been cancelled due to thunderstorms in New Jersey.
summary.zh-CN: 由于新泽西州的雷暴，西班牙在周日世界杯决赛前的最后一场比赛已被取消。

title.en: Rice fires England into early lead against France
title.zh-CN: 大米点燃了英格兰对法国的早期领先优势

summary.en: Captain Declan Rice gives England an early lead, scoring in the third minute against France in the World Cup third-place play-off at Miami Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 队长德克兰·赖斯（ Declan Rice ）让英格兰队早早领先，在迈阿密体育场的世界杯第三场附加赛中对阵法国队的第三分钟得分。

title.en: Messi and Brady in disbelief over 'prophetic' Lamine Yamal photo
title.zh-CN: 梅西和布雷迪对“先知”拉明·亚马尔的照片难以置信

summary.en: Argentina's Lionel Messi says it is "crazy" to be facing Spain's Lamine Yamal in a World Cup final after being photographed with him as a baby.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷的莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）表示，在与西班牙的拉明·亚马尔（ Lamine Yamal ）一起被拍摄为婴儿后，在世界杯决赛中面对西班牙的拉明·亚马尔（ Lam

title.en: The harrowing dark side of England's World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 英格兰世界杯退出的悲惨阴暗面

summary.en: During a major football tournament such as the World Cup, some women and girls are constantly living in fear - because domestic abuse rises when England play, research shows.
summary.zh-CN: 研究表明，在世界杯等大型足球锦标赛期间，一些妇女和女孩一直生活在恐惧之中，因为当英格兰队比赛时，家庭虐待会增加。

title.en: Quiz: Name every men's World Cup final host city
title.zh-CN: 测验：命名每个男子世界杯决赛主办城市

summary.en: The World Cup final is where heroes are made and dreams come true for players and fans alike. Can you name every city that has ever hosted the showpiece?
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯决赛对于球员和球迷来说都是英雄和梦想成真的地方。你能说出每一个曾经举办过展览的城市吗？

title.en: Will the World Cup affect Arsenal's transfer plans?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯会影响阿森纳的转会计划吗？

summary.en: With the World Cup final taking place on Sunday and the start of the Premier League just over a month away, supporters are starting to think about how their side is shaping up for the new campaign.
summary.zh-CN: 随着周日举行的世界杯决赛和距离英超联赛开始仅一个多月的时间，球迷们开始思考他们的球队是如何为新赛季做准备的。
